bio: Adnan Tabatabai is a German-Iranian political analyst and founder of the Center for Applied Research in Partnership with the Orient (CARPO) in Bonn. He was identified as a member of the [Iran Experts Initiative](/events/iei-email-leak-2023). Leaked emails revealed that in May 2014 he offered to ghostwrite op-eds for the Iranian [Foreign Ministry](/orgs/ministry-of-foreign-affairs), writing to [IPIS](/orgs/ipis) head [Mostafa Zahrani](/people/mostafa-zahrani) with the proposal. He attended the inaugural IEI meeting at Vienna's Palais Coburg in May 2014.
editorial_notes: IEI member. Founder of CARPO think tank in Bonn.
